title: web — Fetch/Search/Read Cheatsheet
desc: wkappbot web tools for HTTP and browser access. fetch = raw HTTP GET. search = Google via Chrome CDP. read = navigate + rendered text (JS executed). search needs Chrome running.
steps: FETCH: wkappbot web fetch <url> [--max-chars 5000] — raw HTTP GET
SEARCH: wkappbot web search "query" [--limit 10] — Google via Chrome CDP
READ: wkappbot web read <url> [--max-chars N] — navigate + rendered text
OPEN: wkappbot web open <url> — open in browser (tab dedup by URL)
⚠ search requires Chrome running with CDP port open
⚠ read executes JS — use for SPAs, NOT for static HTML (use fetch)
author: claude
